# Quick Wa Link
> Free WhatsApp link generator with pre-filled message support. Create wa.me links instantly. No sign-up. No login. 100% free.

## What this site does
Quick Wa Link is a free browser-based tool that generates WhatsApp click-to-chat links (wa.me URLs). Users pick a country code from a list of 200+ countries, enter a local phone number, optionally write a pre-filled message, and get a shareable link. Clicking the link opens a WhatsApp conversation directly — the recipient does not need to save the number first.

## Pages

- [Home / Landing Page](https://quickwalink.netlify.app/): Marketing landing page explaining the tool, how it works (4-step guide), use cases, about the developer, and a contact form.
- [App / Generator](https://quickwalink.netlify.app/dashboard): The interactive link generator. Contains the form (country selector, phone input, message textarea), a live WhatsApp phone preview mockup, the generated link output with copy/open buttons, an FAQ section, and a pro-tips panel.

## Key features
- Generates standard wa.me and wa.me?text= URLs
- 199 country codes (full international dialling prefix list)
- Pre-filled message URL-encoded into the link
- Live phone preview shows how the message looks in WhatsApp before sharing
- All processing is client-side — no phone numbers or messages are ever stored or sent to a server
- Progressive Web App (PWA) — installable on mobile and desktop
- Contact form routes through a Netlify serverless function to Google Apps Script for email delivery

## Who built this
Built by Godlove Tikum, a self-taught software engineer and accounting student with previous experience in affiliate marketing, based in Cameroon. He focuses on building fast loading And high converting websites and mobile apps for SMEs.
- Portfolio: https://godlovetikum.netlify.app

- Facebook: https://facebook.com/godlovetikum101

- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@godlovtikum

## Technical notes
- Built with plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript (ES6 classes)
- No frameworks, no build tools, no dependencies
- Hosted on Netlify 
- Contact form uses a Netlify Function (Node.js) forwarding to Google Apps Script
- Service worker provides offline support for cached pages
